caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing winds of 17 kt with wave heights reaching 5.7 ft, while St. Maarten is seeing winds of 18 kt. I expect these conditions to persist with a 45% chance of rain in the region, making for a moderately rough day at sea for ships traveling between these Eastern Caribbean ports.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Conditions: Marseille
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille in the Central Mediterranean is the highest-impact location in the Mediterranean this period, with winds peaking at 27 kt and seas building to 4.8 ft with SSE swell at 5s periods. Rain probability reaches 100% -- expect disrupted conditions for shore excursions and tender operations.
